1. First, you need to add `cudnn` as a dependency in your `Cargo.toml` file. You can do this by adding the following line to the `[dependencies]` section:

```toml
[dependencies]
cudnn = "0.10.0"
```

2. After adding the dependency, you need to link the `cudnn` library to your Rust project. You can do this by adding the following line to the `[lib]` section of your `Cargo.toml` file:

```toml
[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib"]
```
